languages.text: "Ты виноват в гибели Оплота? Твои подельники уничтожили солнце, а вместе с ним — и всю звездную систему!"

traits.locale_text: "Ты виноват в гибели Оплота? Твои подельники уничтожили солнце, а вместе с ним — и всю звездную систему!"
"Ты виноват в гибели Оплота? Твои подельники уничтожили солнце, а вместе с ним — и всю звездную систему!"

languages.text: "Are you responsible for Stronghold's destruction? Your henchmen destroyed the sun and the entire system along with it!"
languages.original_text: "Ты виноват в гибели Оплота? Твои подельники уничтожили солнце, а вместе с ним — и всю звездную систему!"

traits.locale_text: "Are you to blame for Stronghold's destruction? Your henchmen destroyed the sun and the entire system along with it!"
"Are you to blame for Stronghold's destruction? Your henchmen destroyed the sun and the entire system along with it!"
"Are you responsible for Stronghold's destruction? Your henchmen destroyed the sun and the entire system along with it!"
"Are you responsible for Stronghold's destruction? Your henchmen destroyed the sun and the entire system along with it!"
"Are you responsible for Stronghold's destruction? Your henchmen destroyed the sun and the entire system along with it!"

languages.text: "Bist du für die Zerstörung von Stronghold verantwortlich? Deine Handlanger haben die Sonne und mit ihr das ganze System zerstört!"
languages.original_text: "Are you responsible for Stronghold's destruction? Your henchmen destroyed the sun and the entire system along with it!"

traits.locale_text: "Bist du für die Zerstörung von Stronghold verantwortlich? Deine Handlanger haben die Sonne und mit ihr das ganze System zerstört!"

languages.text: "Êtes-vous responsable de la destruction de Stronghold ? Vos sbires ont détruit le soleil et tout le système avec lui !"
languages.original_text: "Are you responsible for Stronghold's destruction? Your henchmen destroyed the sun and the entire system along with it!"

traits.locale_text: "Êtes-vous responsable de la destruction de Stronghold ? Vos sbires ont détruit le soleil et tout le système avec lui !"

languages.text: "¿Eres responsable de la destrucción de Stronghold? Tus secuaces destruyeron el sol y todo el sistema con él".
languages.original_text: "Are you responsible for Stronghold's destruction? Your henchmen destroyed the sun and the entire system along with it!"

traits.locale_text: "¿Eres responsable de la destrucción de Stronghold? Tus secuaces destruyeron el sol y todo el sistema con él".

languages.text: "Stronghold'un yıkımından sen mi sorumlusun? Senin uşakların güneşi ve onunla birlikte tüm sistemi yok etti!"
languages.original_text: "Are you responsible for Stronghold's destruction? Your henchmen destroyed the sun and the entire system along with it!"

traits.locale_text: "Stronghold'un yıkımından sen mi sorumlusun? Senin uşakların güneşi ve onunla birlikte tüm sistemi yok etti!"
